resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign Up
Book boats and taxis for your trips
Offer your boat or taxi services
Upload documents to get verified - it\'s FREE!
Your documents are being reviewed. This usually takes 24–48 hours.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Something went wrong. Please try again.

1. Tap 'Book Boat' or 'Book Taxi'
2. Tap on the map for pickup point
3. Tap again for your destination
4. Tap 'Get Fare' then 'Book'
Tap on the map to set your pickup and dropoff
No drivers are available right now.\nPlease try again later.
No boat captains are available right now.\nPlease try again later.
No taxi drivers are available right now.\nPlease try again later.
The driver has proposed a different fare:
The captain has proposed a different fare:
Pay in CASH when you arrive
Can\'t reach your driver? Contact them above.
Can\'t reach your captain? Contact them above.
This will permanently delete your account and all data. This action cannot be undone.
Phone Number (for riders to contact you)
This info is shown to riders so they can identify you
Riders will see your name, photo, license, and %s info when you accept their ride. This helps them identify you.
Your trip history will appear here after your first ride.
Receive receipts and updates via email
Allow us to access your location for ride requests
How do I book a ride?

1. Open the app and you'll see the map
2. Long-press on the map to set your PICKUP location (green marker)
3. Long-press again to set your DROP OFF location (orange marker)
4. Select your vehicle type (Boat or Taxi)
5. Enter the number of passengers
6. Tap 'Request Ride' and wait for a driver to accept
How do I switch between Boat and Taxi?
On the booking screen, you\'ll see vehicle type buttons (Boat 🚤 or Taxi 🚕). Tap on the one you want. Boats are for water transportation, Taxis are for land transportation.
How do I see nearby drivers?
Tap the \'See Nearby Drivers\' button on the booking screen. This will show you all available drivers/captains on the map so you can see who\'s close to your location.
How do I become a driver?

1. Go to Profile → Become a Driver/Captain
2. Fill in your driver information:
 • Upload a clear photo
 • Enter your license plate number
 • Upload your driver's license (front and back)
 • Choose your vehicle type (Boat, Taxi, or Both)
3. Wait for approval (usually within 24-48 hours)
4. Once approved, you can go online and start accepting rides!
How do I go online as a driver?

1. Open the app
2. Tap the navigation icon in the top right (the steering wheel)
3. This takes you to Driver Mode
4. Tap 'Go Online' to start receiving ride requests
5. When a request comes in, you'll see the pickup/dropoff locations and passenger count
6. Tap 'Accept Ride' to accept
I have both a boat and taxi. How do I switch?

If you registered as having both vehicle types:
1. Go to Driver Mode
2. Look for the vehicle switcher at the top
3. Tap to switch between your Boat and Taxi
4. You'll only see ride requests for your currently selected vehicle type
How do I contact the rider?

Once you accept a ride:
1. You'll see the rider's information
2. Tap the phone icon to call them
3. Tap the message icon to send an SMS
4. Use this to coordinate pickup details

1. Driver accepts your request
2. Driver navigates to your pickup location
3. When driver arrives, they mark 'Arrived'
4. You board the vehicle
5. Driver starts the trip
6. Driver navigates to drop off location
7. When you arrive, driver completes the trip
8. You can rate and tip the driver
How do I contact my driver?

Once a driver accepts your ride:
1. You'll see their name, photo, rating, and vehicle info
2. Tap the phone icon to call them
3. Tap the message icon to text them
4. This helps coordinate the pickup
What if my driver isn\'t showing up?

If your driver is taking too long:
1. Try calling or texting them using the contact buttons
2. If no response, you can cancel the ride
3. Contact support if you have ongoing issues

Fares are based on:
• Distance between pickup and drop off
• Vehicle type (Boats may have different rates)
• Number of passengers
• The driver sets the final price, which you see before confirming
Payment is handled directly between you and the driver. Cash is the most common method. Always confirm the fare with your driver before starting the ride.
Yes! After your ride is complete, you can add a tip. Tips go directly to your driver/captain and are greatly appreciated for good service.
How do I advertise my business?

1. Go to Profile → Advertise your Business
2. Fill in your business details:
 • Business name and description
 • Category
 • Location (shown on the map)
 • Contact information
 • Upload photos
3. Optionally add a coupon to attract customers
4. Choose an advertising plan and duration
5. Your business will appear on the map for riders to see!

When creating an ad, you can add a coupon:
1. Enable 'Add Coupon'
2. Enter the discount (e.g., '10% OFF' or '$5 OFF')
3. Riders will see a coupon icon on your map marker
4. They can tap to see the coupon code
5. Show the code at your business to redeem
How do I update my profile?

Go to Profile → Edit Profile to update:
• Your name
• Phone number
• Profile photo
• Emergency contact information

Yes! We take your privacy seriously:
• Your exact location is only shared with your driver during a ride
• Personal information is encrypted
• We never sell your data to third parties
What if I have a safety concern?
1. Use the \'Report a Safety Issue\' option in Help & Support\n2. Call our support line: +507 6668-6294\n3. In an emergency, always call local emergency services first
Everything. Everywhere. Live.\nThe last map you\'ll ever need.
Subscribe to book boats and taxis anytime
Save up to 45%% with longer plans
Subscribe to book boats and taxis
Your ad is being viewed by %d drivers and riders
%d people have your ad on their phone
Welcome to OmniMap - Everything. Everywhere. Live. Explore the world and book rides in Bocas del Toro!
When you open the app, you\'ll see a map of Bocas del Toro with your current location (blue dot) and all available docks, hotels, restaurants, and points of interest marked on the map.
Make sure to allow location access so the app can show where you are and help drivers find you. Your blue dot shows your exact position on the map.
Pinch to zoom in/out, or use the +/- buttons. Your "You Are Here" marker updates in real-time as you move! Tap any marker to see details. Search "dock" to see all 85+ dock locations.
The green badge shows total online users (passengers + drivers). Watch boat 🚤 and taxi 🚕 icons move live on the map!
Walk within 50 feet (~15m) of any place and it auto-discovers! The Explore tab shows nearby locations as you move around.
Tap the flag button (🇺🇸/🇪🇸) to switch between English and Spanish.
🚤 How to Book a Boat Taxi
Follow these steps to book your water taxi ride:
Tap on the map where you want to be picked up, OR tap the green \'Pickup\' button at the bottom and search for a dock/location. Your pickup point will show as a GREEN marker.
Tap on another location on the map for your destination, OR tap the red \'Dropoff\' button and search. Your dropoff point shows as a RED marker.
Once both locations are set, you\'ll see a BLUE line showing the boat route across the water.
Use the +/- buttons to set how many passengers (1-10). The price adjusts per person for shared rides.
Press the big button at the bottom to send your booking request. Your request goes to ALL online boat drivers in the area.
Wait for a Driver to Accept
The panel turns YELLOW showing \'Finding driver...\'. Drivers see your request and can accept. This usually takes 1-5 minutes.
Driver Accepts with Price - You\'re Booked!
When a driver accepts, they will confirm the ride price. The panel turns GREEN showing the driver\'s name, photo, rating, boat info, phone number, and the confirmed price. They\'re on their way!
Watch the driver\'s boat icon move toward your pickup location in real-time. You\'ll see \'Driver on the way\' or \'Driver arrived\' status.
Tap the phone icon to call your driver directly if you need to communicate pickup details.
Board the boat, enjoy the ride! Payment is made directly to the driver in CASH (USD) at the end of your trip.
Once you send a booking request, please wait for a driver to accept. NO CANCELLATIONS are allowed after booking.
After your ride, you can rate your driver 1-5 stars. Good ratings help other riders choose great drivers!
The driver will confirm the final price when they accept your ride. Pay in CASH (USD) at the end of your trip.
Two ways to search for places:

• Searches EVERYTHING: docks, businesses, drivers, hotels, restaurants
• Shows quick search chips: Docks, Marinas, Ferry, Hotels, Food, Beach, Bars, Tours, Island, Surf, Snorkel, Yoga
• Type any name to find it instantly
• Results show location on map when tapped

• Shows ALL 85+ locations organized by category
• Filter by: All, Docks, Restaurants, Hotels, Resorts, Islands, Beaches, Dolphin Sites, Island Hopping, Tours
• Tap any result to SET IT AS YOUR DROPOFF
• Shows full descriptions of each place
• Great for exploring what's available in Bocas!
Tap \'Search Dock & Places\' then browse categories to discover beaches, restaurants, and hotels you might not know about!
When you tap a search result in \'Search Dock & Places\', it automatically sets that location as your DROPOFF destination.
Understanding the map buttons and markers:
HOME button - Returns to the main booking screen from anywhere
LANGUAGE button - Tap to switch between English and Spanish
SEARCH button - Opens the main search dialog
ISLAND DEALS - Show/Hide business ads on the map (green = showing)
DRIVERS ONLINE - Shows count of boat and taxi drivers online. Tap to show/hide driver icons on map
USERS ONLINE - Shows total users with the app open (passengers + drivers). Updates in real-time!
SEARCH DOCK & PLACES - Opens category-based search with 85+ locations
SHOW/HIDE DOCKS - Toggle all dock/location markers on the map
BLUE DOT - Your current location (updates in real-time as you move!)
YOU ARE HERE - Blue marker showing your exact position, moves with you in real-time
BOAT ICONS - Online boat drivers (moving in real-time)
AD MARKERS - Business advertisements (Island Deals) - tap to see details
+ button (left side) - Zoom in for closer view
- button (left side) - Zoom out for wider view
Pinch with two fingers to zoom in/out
Discover local businesses and special deals!
Business ads appear as colorful markers on the map. Tap any ad marker to see the full business details, photos, description, and contact info.
Tap the \'🏝️ Show Deals\' / \'Hide Deals\' button at the top to show or hide all business ads on the map. Green means ads are visible.
When you tap an ad, a popup shows: Business name, category, description, photo, phone number (tap to call), and exact location.
Business owners can create ads to appear on the map for all Boat Taxie users!
Tap the HOME button (🏠) to go back to the main menu.
Find the \'Island Deals\' card on the home screen and tap it.
Fill in your business name, select a category (Restaurant, Hotel, Tour, etc.), add a description, upload a photo, and set your location on the map.
Enter your phone number and any other contact details so customers can reach you.
Select how long you want your ad to run (1 week, 1 month, 3 months, etc.). Longer durations offer better value!
Review your ad and submit. Payment is required to activate your ad on the map.
Ad pricing varies by duration. Contact support for current rates and special promotions!
Unlock premium features with a subscription!

✅ Appear on the map for riders to see
✅ Receive booking requests from riders
✅ Set your own prices per route
✅ Track your earnings and trips
✅ Build your rating and reputation
✅ Accept unlimited bookings
How to Subscribe as a Driver:
Tap HOME (🏠) to go to the main menu.
Find and tap the \'Driver Mode\' option.
Fill in your details: full name, phone number, vehicle type (boat or taxi), license plate, and upload a photo.
Select your subscription duration: Weekly, Monthly, or Yearly. Longer plans offer better savings!
Pay via the available payment methods. Your subscription activates immediately.
Once subscribed, toggle \'Online\' to start appearing on the map and receiving booking requests!
Free trial may be available for new drivers! Check the Driver Mode screen for current promotions.
Your subscription renews automatically. You can cancel anytime from your profile settings.
Become a boat taxi driver and earn money!
From the Home screen, tap \'Driver Mode\' or \'Become a Driver\' to switch to the driver interface.
Enter your boat/taxi information: type, capacity, license plate, and a photo of your vehicle.
Go to \'My Prices\' to set your rates for different routes. You control how much you charge per trip!
Toggle the \'Online\' switch to start appearing on the rider\'s map. Your location updates in real-time.
When a rider books, you\'ll hear a sound and see the request with pickup/dropoff locations and passenger count. Tap \'Accept\' or \'Decline\'.
After accepting, navigate to the rider\'s pickup location. The app shows their exact position. Tap \'Arrived\' when you get there.
Once the rider boards, tap \'Start Trip\' to begin the ride.
When you arrive at the dropoff, tap \'Complete Trip\'. Collect payment in CASH from the rider.
MY PRICES - Set custom prices for each route (e.g., Bocas to Carenero = $3)
EARNINGS - View your daily, weekly, and monthly earnings
RATINGS - See your average rating from riders
TRIP HISTORY - Review all your completed trips
NOTIFICATIONS - Get alerts for new booking requests
Discover places as you walk or drive around Bocas!
Your \'You Are Here\' marker updates in real-time as you move. Watch it follow you on the map!
When you get within 50 feet (~15 meters) of a registered place, deal, or business, the app automatically shows you info about it!
The \'X Online\' badge shows total users with the app open right now - both passengers and drivers. Great for gauging activity!
WALK AROUND - The app detects when you\'re near a business and shows you deals automatically
REAL-TIME - Your location marker moves with you as you explore the area
ONLINE COUNT - See how many people are using OmniMap right now in Bocas
SEARCH ALL - Search for \'dock\' to see ALL 85+ dock locations at once
Get the most out of OmniMap!
BEST TIMES: Book early morning or late afternoon when more drivers are available
BE PRECISE: Set your pickup at an exact dock for faster pickups
COMMUNICATE: Call your driver if the pickup spot is tricky to find
CASH READY: Have small bills ready - drivers may not have change for large bills
GROUP RIDES: Traveling with friends? Set passenger count to get accurate shared pricing
RATE DRIVERS: Good ratings help great drivers stand out!
A: Payment is CASH directly to the driver at the end of your trip. USD is accepted everywhere in Bocas.
Q: What if no driver accepts?
A: If no driver accepts within 5-10 minutes, try rebooking. Drivers may be busy or offline. You can also try during busier times.
Q: Can I schedule a ride in advance?
A: Currently, OmniMap rides are available in Bocas del Toro. For scheduled trips, contact a driver directly after your first ride.
A: Your location is only shared with your driver AFTER they accept your booking. It\'s used to help them find you.
A: Boat drivers may decline trips in dangerous weather conditions for safety. Taxi drivers may still be available on Isla Colon.
WhatsApp: Contact us for quick support
You haven\'t created any ads. Start advertising your business!
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"?
Your billing history will be preserved for your records.
%d drivers and riders have seen it
Pay to activate and make this ad live

• Unlimited taxi & boat rides
• Real-time tracking
• Priority support
• No hidden fees
How Your Ad Will Be Shown
Your ad appears as a marker on the map for all riders in your area
Featured ads get a highlighted marker and priority placement
Add a coupon to attract more customers - they can tap to redeem!
Upload your logo - it shows directly on the map marker!
Upload a square logo for your business.\nThis will appear on the map marker!
Choose your business location so riders can find you
Attract more customers with a special offer
e.g., Valid for dine-in only. Min. purchase $20
You have lifetime access to all rides
Enjoy your free rides! No subscription required.
• Your ad runs for the full month (30 days)
Payment required to submit your ad
Did you complete the credit card payment of $%s?
By confirming, your %s ad for \"%s\" will be submitted for review.
Too high! Submit a lower price
⚠️ You\'ll go offline when switching vehicles
